rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no textual or operational relationship to Educ. Code §28.0063, which governs early literacy and numeracy assessment instruments for grades K-3. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 28.0063. EARLY LITERACY AND NUMERACY INSTRUMENTS.
_note: Rule text concerns K-3 reading and mathematics assessment instruments; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
